turning the immediate thoroughfare into a highly pressurized slip-and-slide of boiling offal and severed dicks.
so please enjoy the sudden, localized downpour of severed limbs.

leaving a horrific, gelatinous mess that the service ghouls are definitely going to strike over.
immediately liquefying the internal organs of any creature without a Diamond-tier subscription.
creating a permanent biohazard zone that smells distinctly of burnt hair.
generously coating the surrounding architecture in a fine mist of vaporized blood and shattered teeth.
completely atomizing the local flora, fauna, and freelance contractors.
rapidly reducing the local population to a series of easily manageable meat-cubes.
instantly converting the immediate blast radius into a terrifyingly modern art installation of severed limbs.
leaving behind nothing but scorched earth and severed toes.
turning the ambient atmosphere into a suffocating cloud of toxic, weaponized glitter.
guaranteeing that the next cleaning crew will just mass-suicide rather than deal with it.
delivering a truly cinematic shower of boiling viscera to everyone within fifty feet.
violently painting the walls with the shattered dreams and internal organs of the innocent.
leaving the surrounding area looking like a heavily discounted butcher shop.
resulting in an impromptu, highly unsanitary fireworks display of pulverized organs.
ensuring a completely frictionless transition from 'living creature' to 'puddle of red paste.'
immediately converting any innocent bystanders into a fine, nutritious mist.
creating an impromptu indoor swimming pool composed entirely of unidentifiable bodily fluids.
completely stripping the flesh off anyone who didn't read the terms and conditions.
rendering the immediate hallway completely impassable due to knee-deep, boiling gore.
efficiently maximizing shareholder value by turning the local populace into dog food.
guaranteeing a massive influx of worker's comp claims from the surviving cleanup ghouls.

signoffs: Management apologizes for any inconvenience this may cause to your life expectancy.
Emergency cleanup crews have been notified, but they are currently on lunch break.
We are not sorry, but our legal department requires us to pretend we are.
Please note that surviving this event does not entitle you to hazard pay.
Your screams have been recorded for quality assurance and training purposes.
tips: Making an arcane pact with a highly combustible gas anomaly doesn't make you special. It just ensures your eventual death will leave a delightful, hickory-smoked aroma.
If you find yourself completely engulfed in flames, do not stop, drop, and roll. It only spreads the fire and ruins the floor polish. Stand completely still and accept your fate.
Gaining a new "level" doesn't actually mean you are stronger or more resilient. It means the system has authorized the use of industrial-grade ordnance against you.
When falling from a lethal height, try to aim for a shorter, softer party member. It won't save your life, but it will make a much funnier splat sound when you land.
"Teamwork" is an Earth term that translates roughly to: "standing close enough to a slower idiot so they get targeted by the meat-grinder first."
Crouching slightly and walking on the balls of your feet does not actually turn you invisible. The monsters can still completely see you. They are just letting you get into melee range.
Nine out of ten wooden crates contain absolutely nothing of value. The tenth contains either Platinum Tier Loot or a lethal surprise. Keep gambling, heroes.

Combining centuries of high-elven arcane study with martial weapon mastery is an incredible, lifelong achievement. Unfortunately, it provides zero structural protection against a cinderblock dropped directly onto your skull.
The system does not recognize "cleric" or "healer" as valid professions. They are classified as unlicensed medical practitioners, also known in Earth terminology as "Alternative Medicine".
Remember, taking a Short Rest in an uncleared hallway is a great way to wake up without your kidneys. Or your skin. Actually, just don't sleep.
If a chest is breathing, it's not a mimic. It's just heavily diseased. The mimics learned to hold their breath weeks ago.
The gray slop cubes contain exactly 14% of your daily recommended allowance of magnesium, zinc, and vitamin B12. They also may contain pulverized orphans.
Swinging two weapons at once mathematically doubles your chances of dropping one in a puddle of your own intestines.
The Syndicate does not recognize "screaming for mercy" as a valid form of dispute resolution. Please submit all grievances in writing via the nearest incinerator.
Casting fire spells in poorly ventilated, grease-coated industrial kitchens is a fantastic idea. Try it!
The leading cause of death on this floor is "acute atmospheric ignition." The second is "believing the MLM sales pitch".
Applying premium wellness mud instantly restores hit points by forcefully rooting into your nervous system. Ignore the whispering. The mud just wants what's best for you.
Minimum Wage Ghouls do not drop loot, grant experience, or feel joy. Striking them only damages whatever is left of your soul.
Always check the expiration date on your healing potions. Expired potions don't heal you. They just rapidly accelerate the growth of your fingernails.
Wendy's is a designated safe zone. The crippling depression you feel while eating a soggy fry dipped in a frosty is entirely organic and not a magical effect.
If the floor looks frictionless and smells like grapefruit, do not attempt an Acrobatics check. Just accept gravity and prepare for total epidermal degloving.
Forty percent of the decorative "wood" in this sector is just calcified tumor-matter painted beige. Live, Laugh, Love.
Remember, you don't have to outrun the Gibbering Mouther. You just have to trip the Gnome.
Brass tokens cannot be exchanged for real currency, basic human dignity, or your original un-mutilated body. They are exclusively for the Whack-A-Mole.
Dehydration is a slow killer. Drinking from the bubbling flesh-pipes is a very, very fast killer. Choose your pacing.
Cult fanatics with crystals glued to their foreheads cannot be reasoned with. However, drawing a pyramid on the wall will completely paralyze their cognitive functions.
"The Meat Sweats" is not just a colloquialism. Your pores are literally weeping highly reactive sodium. Please stand clear of open flames.
